title: Luxurious White Microfibre After Shower Hair Wrap Towel - 55cm x 22cm (1 Pc.) - Ultra Absorbent & Quick Drying Hair Turban - Perfect Size for All Hair Types
features: CHIC & FUNCTIONAL DESIGN: Our Luxurious White Microfibre After Shower Hair Wrap Towel features a sleek and stylish design that pairs well with any bathroom decor, making it a must-have accessory for all your hair care needs.

EXCEPTIONAL QUALITY: Made from plush and ultra-soft microfibre material, this hair wrap towel is designed to be highly durable and endure frequent use, ensuring you a long-lasting product that will hold up to your daily hair care routine.

EASY TO USE: Simply wrap the 55cm x 22cm hair turban around your wet hair, twist and secure it with the button closure – perfect for keeping your hair in place while you perform your skincare routine or apply makeup for a hassle-free experience.

PERFECT FOR ALL HAIR TYPES: Our hair wrap towel is the ideal size to accommodate short, medium, or long hair, making it suitable for everyone in your household, no matter their hair length or texture.

LIGHTWEIGHT & TRAVEL-FRIENDLY: Say goodbye to lugging around heavy, wet towels – our ultra-absorbent and quick-drying hair wrap makes for the perfect gym or travel companion, saving you space and keeping your hair looking fabulous on-the-go.
description: Our Shower Hair Wrap is sure to add some glamour and style to your morning routine!
